results.description: Ordered (descending by score) list of hits.

StorageSearchHit.description:
One hit in [`StorageSearchResult::results`]. Mirror of
[`crate::SearchResult`] — kept in sync manually; compared via
`cargo test -p nexus-bootstrap --test ipc_schema_emit`.

block_id.description: Unique ID of the matching block.

excerpt.description: Excerpt of the matching content (may be empty).

file_path.description: Path to the file containing the matching block.

mtime.title: 375 — the block's file mtime, Unix seconds.

score.description:
BM25 relevance score. `0.0` when the request's `sort` was
`mtime_desc`/`mtime_asc`.
